startPoint.en: Speak to Death in the City of Um.
startPoint.es: Habla con Death en la City of Um.

items.name: Ghostspeak amulet
items.display: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed

items.name: Empower vessel
items.display: Items for the empower vessel ritual:

recommended.name: Slayer Tower
recommended.display: A quick teleport to the Slayer Tower, such as:

recommended.name: City of Um
recommended.display: Teleport to City of Um, such as:

children.name: Draynor lodestone
children.display: Draynor lodestone and enter the underworld

children.name: Spirit rune
children.display: Ten spirit runes to cast City of Um Teleport twice

children.name: Underworld Grimoire 2
children.display: Either of the Underworld Grimoire 2's teleport options

recommended.name: Salve amulet
recommended.display: Salve amulet or salve amulet (e) for increased damage against the tortured souls

rewards.name: Necromancy XP lamp (Vessel of the Harbinger)
Prayer XP lamp (Vessel of the Harbinger)
Well of Souls
rewards.display: 25 souls added to the Well of Souls

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed
Ectophial
Speak to Death in the City of Um.
text.es: Habla con Death en la City of Um.

text.en: Teleport to the Ectofuntus using the Ectophial.
text.es: Teletranspórtate al Ectofuntus usando el Ectophial.

text.en: Speak to Necrovarus.
text.es: Habla con Necrovarus.

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed, a bucket of slime and Necromancy weapons
Ectophial
Kill 5 Tortured souls with Necromancy to the north to fill the soul urn.
text.es: Mata a 5 Tortured souls con Nigromancia al norte para llenar la urna de almas.

text.en: Worship the Ectofuntus with the filled urn and a bucket of slime in backpack.
text.es: Adora el Ectofuntus con la urna llena y un bucket of slime en la mochila.

text.en: Gather a bucket of slime from the Pool of Slime, no bucket is required to gather the slime.
text.es: Recoge un bucket of slime del Pool of Slime; no se necesita ningún cubo para recoger el slime.

text.en: Speak to Necrovarus.
text.es: Habla con Necrovarus.

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed, an ectoplasm, and Necromancy weapons including a conduit
A ring of slaying or Dungeoneering cape, an Ectophial, and five spirit runes to cast City of Um Teleport
Head to Netty's house, on the eastern side of the Slayer Tower.
text.es: Dirígete a la casa de Netty, en el lado este de la Slayer Tower.

text.en: Teleport to the Slayer Tower by using ring of slaying or Dungeoneering cape (,,) or mask of the Abyss.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a la Slayer Tower usando un ring of slaying, la capa de Dungeoneering (,,) o la mask of the Abyss.

text.en: Otherwise, teleport to Canifis lodestone and run west past graveyard, where ghouls wander, and then directly north.
text.es: Si no, teletranspórtate a la piedra de viaje de Canifis y corre hacia el oeste pasando el cementerio, donde deambulan ghouls, y luego directamente al norte.

text.en: Inspect the pile of letters just inside Netty's front door. If you do not have the option to inspect, you have missed a previous step.
text.es: Inspecciona el montón de cartas justo dentro de la puerta principal de la casa de Netty. Si no tienes la opción de inspeccionar, te has saltado un paso anterior.

text.en: Teleport back to the Ectofuntus and enter Port Phasmatys to speak to Velorina who is located at the northernmost house.
text.es: Teletranspórtate de vuelta al Ectofuntus y entra en Port Phasmatys para hablar con Velorina, que se encuentra en la casa más al norte.

text.en: Head to the Last Call pub in the City of Um, east of the City of Um lodestone.
text.es: Dirígete al pub Last Call en la City of Um, al este de la piedra de viaje de la City of Um.

text.en: Speak to Netty in the northeast corner of the pub to receive Netty's death certificate and will.
text.es: Habla con Netty en la esquina noreste del pub para recibir el certificado de defunción y el testamento de Netty.

text.en: Head to the bank in Port Phasmatys and speak to a ghost banker to claim Netty's key.
text.es: Dirígete al banco de Port Phasmatys y habla con un banquero fantasma para reclamar la llave de Netty.

text.en: Head back to Netty's house.
text.es: Regresa a la casa de Netty.

text.en: Open the chest.
text.es: Abre el cofre.

text.en: Use your Conjure Skeleton Warrior with a conduit equipped and attack Netty's skeleton. She will flee.
text.es: Usa tu Conjure Skeleton Warrior con un conducto equipado y ataca al esqueleto de Netty. Ella huirá.

text.en: Open the chest again to receive the book of Haricanto.
text.es: Abre el cofre de nuevo para recibir el book of Haricanto.

text.en: Ghostspeak amulet or cramulet unless the hard Morytania achievements have been completed, a bucket, 11 basic ghostly ink, 2 regular ghostly ink, 4 basic ritual candles (or better).
An Ectophial, and five spirit runes to cast City of Um Teleport
Head back to Ectofuntus and talk to Necrovarus.
text.es: Regresa al Ectofuntus y habla con Necrovarus.

text.en: Use a bucket on the Ectofuntus.
text.es: Usa un cubo en el Ectofuntus.

text.en: Go to the ritual site in City of Um.
text.es: Ve al lugar del ritual en la City of Um.

text.en: Prepare an empower vessel ritual by using the pedestal.
text.es: Prepara un ritual de empower vessel usando el pedestal.

text.en: It requires 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, 1 Commune I, 4 ritual light sources and 1 bucket of powerful slime as the focus.
text.es: Requiere 2 Elemental I, 1 Change I, 1 Commune I, 4 fuentes de luz ritual y 1 bucket of powerful slime como foco.

text.en: Total 11 basic ghostly ink, 2 regular ghostly ink, 4 basic ritual candles or better to prepare the ritual from scratch.
text.es: En total, 11 basic ghostly ink, 2 regular ghostly ink y 4 basic ritual candles o mejores para preparar el ritual desde cero.

text.en: Complete the ritual.
text.es: Completa el ritual.

text.en: Watch the cutscene.
text.es: Observa la escena.

text.en: If the cutscene does not play, talk to Necrovarus.
text.es: Si la escena no se reproduce, habla con Necrovarus.

text.en: Speak to Death.
text.es: Habla con Death.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!
